creator: pauls@utdallas.edu
text:
security/barnyard-sguil6, see PR122648, I have requested a repocopy of this port
	to security/barnyard-sguil.  I've never done one before, so I'm not sure of the
	correct procedure, but I thought these patches might be needed.  They correct all
	the entires of barnyard-sguil6 to change them to barnyard-sguil.
